title: [Makefile] Fix docker documentation install and generation
body:
The final versions of the documentation has been shifted from `docs/` to
`docs/build/man`. Most of the Makefile has been changed accordingly, but
the docker documentation generation was not.

Introduced by #4354

Signed-off-by: Morten Linderud <morten@linderud.pw>

comments.body:
Hi @Foxboron. Thanks for your PR.

I'm waiting for a [containers](https://github.com/orgs/containers/people) member to verify that this patch is reasonable to test. If it is, they should reply with `/ok-to-test` on its own line. Until that is done, I will not automatically test new commits in this PR, but the usual testing commands by org members will still work. Regular contributors should [join the org](https://github.com/orgs/containers/people) to skip this step.

Once the patch is verified, the new status will be reflected by the `ok-to-test` label.

I understand the commands that are listed [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod).

<details>

Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
</details>
Seems like there was some sections forgotten while doing the restructure. Unsure if this is everything or if there are more stuff missing from #4354
The changes look reasonable to me, but I'd like @baude to weigh in.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *baude*, *Foxboron* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [baude] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
I'll add an official LGTM as @baude is hip with these changes.
Should be noted that `make install.docker` is currently broken in the `1.6.3` release.
Why wasn't this included in `1.6.4`? `make install.docker` is still broken.
1.6.4 is a backports-only long term support release. The next proper mainline release will be 1.7.0 - the first RC is out, the final tag should be pushed later today or tomorrow.
(The timing here worked out to be very confusing - sorry for that. Ideally 1.7.0 final would be out before we did a backports release for 1.6.x)
I don't quite see how this patch would be excluded from backports. But that means `make install.docker` is not expected to work on the LTS release?

Right now, we're only adding critical-severity bugfixes. We should do a better job of marking these releases, though, we don't intend on them being consumed by most distros. The intention was to get 1.7.0 out soon enough that most people would go straight from 1.6.3 to 1.7.0.
Ack. I'll just not bother with `1.6.4` then :) Thanks for the explanation!
